title: geum kokanicum
intro: Geum kokanicum, also known as Kokanic geum or Himalayan avens, is a perennial plant species in the family Rosaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Geum kokanicum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Geum kokanicum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
